This was a wonderful opportunity to see whales seals, and porpoises and learn about the environment & ecosystem of San Francisco Bay. Mandy, our guide  who is a marine biologist taught us so much about the animals that inhabit the bay and how to protect them. Loved the trip.

Excellent trip, with lots of great memories. The boat left on time, was spacious for the number of guests, the host provided good information tid bits, the facilitator (Catie) made sure to point out whales so we don't miss them. They took us close enough to the whales, and one of the most memorable instances for me was when a gray whale rose from the water literally on the side of the boat. It was a wonderful experience. We also got to see Alcatraz from up close. It helped that the weather was perfect.
